# @inth/docs Full Context Router

> Start with the product summary, then the curated docs summary, then one topic-specific full-context file if needed.

## Recommended Flow

- [Product Summary](https://example.invalid/@inth/docs/llms.txt): Short product-oriented overview of @inth/docs.
- [Documentation Summary](https://example.invalid/@inth/docs/docs/llms.txt): Curated docs map for implementation work.
- [Documentation Full Router](https://example.invalid/@inth/docs/docs/llms-full.txt): Topic-specific deep-context files.
